question: Which Python keyword do you use when you want to define or create a new function?

options.A: The computer memorizes the steps, but it will not run them yet
options.B: The computer runs the steps immediately
options.C: The computer deletes the function automatically
options.D: The program crashes with a major error

question: What is the main reason programmers use functions in Python?

options.A: To group a bunch of code together so you don't have to rewrite it over and over
options.B: To make the computer screen change colors faster
options.C: To automatically turn numbers into text messages
options.D: To check if a condition is True or False only once

question:

What do you need to type next to actually run (or call) this function?
